sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْمُهِمِّ إِيجَادُ تَوَازُنٍ بَيْنَ الْعَمَلِ وَالرَّاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Važno je pronaći ravnotežu između posla i odmora.
sentences.translationEn: It is important to find a balance between work and rest.

sentences.arabic: أُنْهِي عَمَلِي فِي السَّاعَةِ الرَّابِعَةِ بَعْدَ الظُّهْرِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Svaki dan završavam posao u četiri sata poslijepodne.
sentences.translationEn: I finish my work at four in the afternoon every day.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ، أَقْضِي وَقْتًا مُمْتِعًا مَعَ أَطْفَالِي فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon toga provodim ugodno vrijeme sa svojom djecom u parku.
sentences.translationEn: After that, I spend quality time with my children in the park.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا يُسَاعِدُنِي عَلَى الشُّعُورِ بِالسَّعَادَةِ وَالنَّشَاطِ.
sentences.translation: To mi pomaže da se osjećam sretno i energično.
sentences.translationEn: This helps me feel happy and energetic.
